selection_protocol: Partial overlay-in-loop scan was stopped after 678 test backtests due runtime; parsed completed artifacts only. Train 2023-2024H1, test 2024H2-2025, eval 2026 Jan-May. Eval was inspected only after test constraints.
conclusion: Alpha improved versus previous symbolic surface: test MDD<=15 with hundreds of trades is now possible, and 2026 eval remains positive. However test CAGR/MDD ratio is only about 0.70, far below target, so this is a research lead not a live candidate.
